ancient_lorekeeper.name: Ancient Lorekeeper
description: ## Ancient Lorekeeper
‹SOURCE Advanced Race Guide/24›

The ancient lorekeeper is a repository for all the beliefs and vast knowledge of an ‹race/elve«n<s› people. She shows a strong interest in and understanding of histories and creation legends at a young age, and as she matures her calling to serve as the memory of her long-lived people becomes clear to all who know her. An ancient lorekeeper has the following class features.
::prereq{r=Elf}

::cskill{gain=ka~kl noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" postTitle="Passive Ability" preHL post="Whenever she makes a Knowledge check of any kind about a question regarding elves (creatures of the elf subtype), the ancient lorekeeper adds half her class level on her check."}

::ab[Elven Arcana (Ex)]{l=2 icon=learn-boost ability="An ancient lorekeeper's mastery of elven legends and philosophy has allowed her to master one spell used by elven wizards. She selects one spell from the ‹main/spells>sorcerer»/wizard« spell list› that is at least one level lower than the highest-level oracle spell she can cast. The ancient lorekeeper gains this as a bonus spell known. The spell is treated as one level higher than its true level for all purposes." repeat="The ancient lorekeeper may choose an additional spell.~4~2~19" replace="Bonus spells gained from the oracle's mystery"}

@HL[Mysteries:] The following oracle mysteries complement the ancient lorekeeper archetype: ‹mystery/Lore›, ‹mystery/Nature›, ‹mystery/Waves›, ‹mystery/Wind›, ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/Time›, ‹mystery/Wood›.

black_blooded_oracle.name: Black-Blooded Oracle
description: ## Black-Blooded Oracle
‹SOURCE Inner Sea Magic/32›

The black-blooded oracle has been infused with the eerie influence of strange fluids that seep from the rock in the deepest pits of the Darklands, the so-called "‹magic-artifact/Black Blood of Orv›." Often, the eerie taint of the black blood can lie dormant in a lineage for generations before manifesting. It even seems capable of reaching out to touch those destined to become oracles through other strange methods. However an oracle becomes black-blooded, her divine powers carry within them the weird power of this chilling magical substance. A black-blooded oracle has the following class features.
See the link above for rules on the black blood itself, but note that a black-blooded oracle does not require access to this eldritch substance to function.

::ab[Curse of Black Blood (Su)]{icon=down-magic-def order=np note="All black-blooded oracles effectively share the same curse: the curse of black blood. The material affects these oracles physically and mentally, altering both physiology and mystic powers. The blood of a black-blooded oracle actually runs black, and wounds she suffers are infected by her own power and are difficult to heal." passive="She is immune to the effects (both beneficial and destructive) of black blood. Positive and negative energy affect a black-blooded oracle as if she were undead: positive energy harms her, while negative energy heals her (this aspect of the curse has no effect if the oracle is undead). The curse also dulls the oracle's coordination somewhat, imparting a -4 penalty on all Dexterity-based skill checks." imp5="She gains cold resistance 5." imp10="This increases to cold resistance 10." imp15="She gains immunity to cold." replace="Oracle's curse"}
::ab[Black Blood Revelations]{head icon=power note="All black-blooded oracles have access to the following revelations, regardless of what mystery they choose."}

::ab[Black Blood Spray (Su)]{next icon=def-touch immediate="Whenever a black-blooded oracle takes piercing or slashing damage, she can cause some of her black blood to spray from the wound to strike any adjacent target. She must make a touch attack to hit the target (if she's attacking the creature that caused the wound, she gains a +4 circumstance bonus on her attack roll). If she hits, she deals 1d8 points of cold damage + an additional number of points equal to ‹misc/half› her oracle level." useInc="2~oracle" useF="2~1" useM=1}

::ab[Dark Resilience (Su)]{next icon=def flavor="The black blood flowing through a black-blooded oracle's veins gives her resistance to many effects to which undead are immune." immediate="Once per day whenever she fails a saving throw against an ‹rule/ability drain›, a death effect, disease, ‹rule/energy drain›, paralysis, or poison, she may attempt that saving throw again with a +4 circumstance bonus. She must take the second result, even if it is worse." imp7="She can use this ability twice per day." imp15="She can use the ability 3 times per day."}
::ab[Darkvision (Ex)]{next icon=power ability="A black-blooded oracle gains darkvision with a range of 60 feet." imp15="The range increases to 90 feet."}

community_guardian.name: Community Guardian
description: ## Community Guardian
‹SOURCE Advanced Race Guide/63›

The community guardian is chosen to protect and succor the weak and innocent within her community. Her calling also allows her to draw upon and focus the collective will in order to achieve those goals. A community guardian has the following class features.
::prereq{r=Halfling other="Alignment must be good."}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/ancestor›, ‹mystery/life›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›.
::cskill{gain=kl~ling~per~sur noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." s2="Bless water" s4=Consecrate s6="Remove disease" s10=Hallow s12="Heroes' feast" replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 4th, 6th, 10th, and 12th levels from the oracle's mystery"}
::ab[Revelations]{icon=info head note="A community guardian must take the following revelations at the listed levels."}

::ab[Spirit of Community (Ex)]{l=1 icon=boost next move="You call upon the spirits of community. For the next round, you grant every ally within 30 feet a +1 competence bonus on a single skill check (of the ally's choice) that it makes before the end of this revelation's duration. Furthermore, allies within 30 feet can, as a @HLfree_action, choose to forgo this bonus, and instead grant a single ally a +1 increase to its competence bonus granted by this ability (maximum +5)." useMod=Charisma3}

::ab[Renewing Radiance (Su)]{l=3 icon=protect-aid next ability="Once per day you can produce a ‹misc/burst› of swirling white light that provides a measure of protection and renewal to allies within 30 feet for 1 round. On their turn, the allies can choose either to gain a +1 sacred bonus to AC for 1 round or to heal a number of hit points equal to 1d6 + your Charisma bonus (their choice). If an ally is ‹misc/dying›, it is ‹misc/stabilize«d› instead." imp7="The bonus to AC increases to +2, and the healing increases to 2d6 + your Charisma bonus hit points." imp14="The bonus to AC increases to +3, and the healing increases to 3d6 + your Charisma bonus hit points."}

cyclopean_seer.name: Cyclopean Seer
description: ## Cyclopean Seer
‹SOURCE Inner Sea Monster Codex/17›
A cyclopean seer draws power from the mysterious prophetic abilities of ancient giants.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/occult›, ‹mystery/time›.
::cskill{gain=ka~kd~ke~kg~kl~kna~kno~ling noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}
::ab[Oracle's Curse]{icon=info note="A cyclopean seer must choose the ‹oraclecurse/haunted›, ‹oraclecurse/hunger›, ‹oraclecurse/powerless prophecy›, or ‹oraclecurse/tongues› curse."}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn ability="Each time a cyclopean seer would gain a bonus spell from her mystery, she instead selects a ‹main/spells_>divination› spell from any class's spell list. If the spell is not on the cleric/oracle spell list, it must be at least 1 level lower than the highest-level oracle spell the cyclopean seer can cast." alter="Bonus spells granted by the oracle's mystery"}

::ab[Assume Fate (Su)]{icon=lower-def immediate="When targeted by an effect that requires a saving throw, you can choose another creature within line of sight that is attempting a save against the same effect. The target takes a penalty on its saving throw equal to 1d4 + 1 for every 4 levels you possess. You gain the value of their penalty as a luck bonus on your saving throw." useMod=Charisma replace="Revelation gained at 1st level"}

::ab[Brutal Trance (Su)]{standard="You can enter a trance that lasts 1 round per oracle level you possess. While in this trance, you are ‹misc/confused›, but each round that you can act normally, you can ask a single question as if using ‹spell/commune›." icon=magic replace="Revelation gained at 7th level"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=power note="All cyclopean seers have access to the following revelations, regardless of their chosen mysteries." alter=Revelations}

::ab[Doomsaying (Su)]{next icon=lower standard="You can pronounce doom on a creature within 30 feet. The target takes a penalty equal to your oracle level on either all skill checks, all savings throws, or all attack rolls (your choice) for 1 minute or until he fails one such roll." special="This is a curse effect." useMod=Charisma}

::ab[Flash of Insight (Su)]{next icon=roll order=ai ability="You gain the ‹monster/cyclops› racial ability of the same name. If you already possess this ability, you gain an additional daily use." immediate="*Text from the* cyclops *entry:* Once per day, a cyclops can peer into an occluded visual spectrum of possible futures, gaining insight that allows it to select the exact result of one die roll before the roll is made. This effect can alter an action taken by the cyclops only, and cannot be applied to the rolls of others."}

::ab[Prescience (Ex)]{next icon=def passive="You gain a bonus to your Armor Class against attacks of opportunity and a bonus on ‹rule/concentration› checks. These bonuses are equal to 2 + ‹misc/one-fifth› of your oracle level."}

::ab[Final Revelation]{icon=magic-roll l=20 ability="Upon reaching 20th level, you embody ancient cyclopes' insight. You can use each of the following once per day as a spell-like ability: ‹spell/discern location›, ‹spell/prying eyes›, and ‹spell/stone tell›." special="In addition, using *flash of insight* to select a d20 roll result equal to or lower than your Charisma modifier doesn't expend that ability." replace="Final revelation"}

divine_numerologist.name: Divine Numerologist
description: ## Divine Numerologist
‹SOURCE Disciple's Doctrine/17›

The Oracular Council of Po Li and those trained in their sacred methods often include divine numerologists, who use esoteric mathematics and numbers traditions to peer into the past and future and extract meaningful portents. The divine numerologist's ultimate goal is to learn and understand the patterns in the equations and algorithms that underscore even the most chaotic forms of reality and use them to their personal advantage.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] Any.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 10th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s10="Prying eyes" s12="Numerological evocation" s14="Greater arcane sight" s16="Moment of prescience" s18=Foresight}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=power ability="A divine numerologist must take the following revelations at the listed levels." replace="1st- and 7th-level revelations"}

::ab[Calculate the Odds (Su)]{next l=1 icon=boost provokes=No swift="Once per day, the divine numerologist can quickly tabulate the variables affecting the current situation. This grants the divine numerologist a circumstance bonus equal to her Charisma modifier (minimum +1) to her next d20 roll within 1 round. If the divine numerologist does not use this bonus within 1 round, the use of this ability is wasted." imp7="The divine numerologist can use this ability twice a day." imp15="She may use this 3 times per day."}

::ab[Program the Divine Algorithm (Su)]{next l=7 icon=roll flavor="The divine numerologist's mastery of the divine mathematics allows her to set specific parameters in the divine equation to adjust the outcome of an event right as it is about to occur." provokes=No immediate="Once per day, the divine numerologist can take the average of a single roll of one or more dice, averaging each die separately (for example, the average of a d20 roll is 10, the average of 3d6 is 9, and so on). When using this ability, the divine numerologist can add any modifiers to the roll as normal." special="The divine numerologist must decide to use this ability immediately before the roll she chooses to affect, and the divine numerologist cannot reroll this roll, even if she has a feat or another ability that would normally allow her to do so." imp11="She may use this ability twice a day." imp15="She can use this three times a day, and instead of treating a roll as its average, she can instead treat the roll as its maximum result (for example, the divine numerologist can treat a d20 roll as if the result were 20)."}

::ab[Final Revelation]{l=20 order=pa icon=def-boost passive="A divine numerologist understands the math behind the entirety of existence well enough to significantly tweak her own personal fate. The divine numerologist ceases aging. She no longer suffers age-related penalties to ability scores and cannot be magically aged." ability="Once per day when the divine numerologist or another allied creature within 30 feet of her threatens a critical hit, the critical hit is automatically confirmed."}

dual_cursed_oracle.name: Dual-Cursed Oracle
description: ## Dual-Cursed Oracle
‹SOURCE Ultimate Magic/58›

All oracles are cursed to some degree, but some oracles bear an even heavier burden. Though doubly afflicted with supernatural or physical hindrances, a dual-cursed oracle can manipulate fortune and gains greater insights into her mystery.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] Any.

::ab[Oracle's Curse]{icon=info note="A dual-cursed oracle must choose two curses at 1st level. One of these curses (oracle's choice) never changes its abilities as the oracle gains levels; for example, an oracle with ‹oraclecurse/clouded vision› never gains darkvision 60 feet, blindsense, or blindsight. The other curse comes with its normal benefits." alter="Oracle's curse"}
::ab[Class Skills]{icon=down note="A dual-cursed oracle gains no additional class skills from her mystery."}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 4th, and 6th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="Ill omen" s4="Oracle's burden" s6="Bestow curse"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=power repeatAt="A dual-cursed oracle gains a bonus revelation.~5~13" special="The cursed oracle may select the following revelations in place of a mystery revelation."}

::ab[Misfortune (Ex)]{next l=1 icon=roll immediate="You can force a creature within 30 feet to reroll any one d20 roll that it has just made before the results of the roll are revealed. The creature must take the result of the reroll, even if it's worse than the original roll." special="Once a creature has suffered from your misfortune, it cannot be the target of this revelation again for 1 day."}

::ab[Fortune (Ex)]{next l=5 icon=roll immediate="You can reroll any one d20 roll that you have just made before the results of the roll are revealed. You must take the result of the reroll, even if it's worse than the original roll." useInc="6~oracle~5" useF="5~1~6"}

elementalist_oracle.name: Elementalist Oracle
description: ## Elementalist Oracle
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/68;People of the Sands/15›

An elementalist oracle shares an affinity with the elements and elemental creatures. She can communicate with elemental creatures and can eventually become an elemental herself. She sees perfection in manifestations of elemental fury in the natural world, be they the thunderous wrath of the storm, the churning waters of the ocean's tides or a flooding river, the terrain-shaping power of a landslide or earthquake, or the apocalyptic fury of a volcanic eruption.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Flame›, ‹mystery/stone›, ‹mystery/waves›, ‹mystery/wind›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 4th, 6th, 8th, 10th, 12th and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s4="Elemental touch" s6="Protection from energy" s8="Elemental body I" s10="Summon monster V~ (elementals only)" s12="Elemental body III" s18="Elemental swarm"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="An elementalist oracle must take the following revelations at the listed levels."}

::ab[Elemental Linguist (Su)]{next l=1 icon=power ability="You gain a bonus language of your choice from the following list: Aquan, Auran, Ignan, or Terran." repeatAt="You gain another language chosen from this list.~5~10~15"}
:::ab{title="Elemental Form (Su)" action=Ability next l=11 icon=power}
You gain the air, earth, fire, or water subtype and an associated ability:
- @HL[Air:] Fly speed of 30 feet with perfect maneuverability.
- @HL[Earth:] ‹umr/Tremorsense› with a range of 30 feet.
- @HL[Fire:] Immunity to fire and vulnerability to cold.
- @HL[Water:] Swim speed of 30 feet and the ability to breathe underwater.

::ab[Elemental Revelation (Su)]{next l=20 icon=magic-lower ability="You fully harness the power of the elements. You can apply the ‹feat/Elemental Spell› metamagic feat to spells you cast without increasing the level or casting time. You can choose acid, cold, electricity, or fire each time you use this ability." order=ap passive="Whenever you score a critical hit with an attack that deals energy damage, you ignore the target's energy resistance (if any). If you score such a critical hit against a creature that has immunity to the energy type you are attacking with, the creature takes half damage from the attack." replace="Final revelation"}

enlightened_philosopher.name: Enlightened Philosopher
description: ## Enlightened Philosopher
‹SOURCE Ultimate Magic/58›

The enlightened philosopher seeks enlightenment through compassion, moderation, and humility. By following her philosophy's teachings, the enlightened philosopher seeks to reach enlightenment and become one with the universe.
::prereq{other="Alignment must be lawful"}

@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/ancestor›, ‹mystery/flame›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/metal›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/stone›, ‹mystery/time›, ‹mystery/waves›, ‹mystery/wood›.
::cskill{gain=ka~kd~ke~kg~kl~kna~kno~ling noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="All bonus spells gained from the oracle's mystery after 2nd level" s4="Owl's wisdom" s6="Water walk" s8="Discern lies" s10="True seeing" s12="Wind walk" s14="Ethereal jaunt" s16="Moment of prescience" s18="Astral projection"}
::ab[Revelations]{head l7="An enlightened philosopher must take the following revelation." icon=power}

::ab[Mental Acuity (Ex)]{next icon=boost order=np note="This is the same as the ‹mystery/lore› mystery revelation of the same name." flavor="Your explorations into the secret mysteries of the world have granted you a preternatural understanding of all things - and you just keep getting smarter." passive="You gain a +1 inherent bonus to Intelligence upon taking this revelation." increment="The bonus to Intelligence~7~3"}

::ab[Final Revelation]{l=20 order=pa flavor="You achieve true enlightenment and become one with the universe." icon=def-power-magic passive="You receive a bonus on all saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier. You become immune to confusion, exhaustion, fatigue, nausea, and sickened effects." ability="You can take 20 on all Knowledge skill checks." special="Should you die, you are reborn 3 days later as a living example of the summoning of your chosen philosophy (treat as the ‹spell/reincarnate› spell)." replace="Final revelation"}

hermit.name: Hermit
description: ## Hermit
‹SOURCE Legacy of the First World/22›

A hermit is a recluse who gained her oracular powers from isolation in a deep desert, on a mountain peak, or in another secluded location. A connection to untraveled places gives the hermit powers to evade his enemies.

::ab[Mystery]{icon=down choice="A hermit must choose a mystery that adds Survival to his list of class skills: ‹mystery/apocalypse›, ‹mystery/heavens›&#42&, ‹mystery/juju›, ‹mystery/life›&#42&, ‹mystery/lunar›, ‹mystery/nature›&#42&, ‹mystery/outer rifts›, ‹mystery/reaper›, ‹mystery/solar›, ‹mystery/spellscar›, ‹mystery/stone›&#42&, ‹mystery/succor›, ‹mystery/volcano›, ‹mystery/winter›, or ‹mystery/wood›." order=cn note="Mysteries marked with an asterisk (&#42&) are recommended."}
::ab[Oracle's Curse]{icon=info note="A hermit must choose the ‹oraclecurse/reclusive› curse at 1st level."}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 4th, 8th, 12th, and 16th levels from the oracle's mystery" s4="Blindness/deafness" s8="Crushing despair" s12="Wall of force" s16=Maze}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info head note="A hermit must take the following revelations at the listed levels."}

::ab[Recluse's Stride (Su)]{next l=1 icon=power-def-magic passive="Your base speed increases by 10 feet." imp5="Once per round when leaving a square, you can treat the square as though it isn't threatened by any opponents that you can see." imp10="You can teleport a distance equal to your base land speed (as per ‹spell/dimension door›) as a @HLmove_action, provided that there are no other creatures within 10 feet of you when you use this ability and no other creatures within 10 feet of your destination. You can teleport a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Charisma modifier."}

::ab[Fade from Memory (Su)]{next l=7 icon=def free="Whenever there are no creatures within 10 feet of you at the end of your turn, you gain 20% ‹rule/concealment› until the beginning of your next turn." imp14="You instead gain 50% concealment until the beginning of your next turn." useL=oracle useUnit=time}

inerrant_voice.name: Inerrant Voice
description: ## Inerrant Voice
‹SOURCE Heroes of the High Court/17›
An inerrant voice serves as a spiritual advisor to either a monarch or noble. Most Qadiran nobles retain one's services, for both guidance and protection.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/intrigue›, ‹mystery/life›, ‹mystery/lore›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 4th, 8th, and 14th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="Shield other" s4=Augury s8=Divination s14=Vision}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info l3="An inerrant voice must take the following revelation."}

::ab[Vigilant Protector (Su)]{next order=cui icon=protect choice="Each day when you recover your spells, you can select a specific person you know other than yourself as your ward." immediate="When your ward becomes the target of an attack or spell and you are aware of the attack, you can cast an abjuration spell you know on the ally. You must expend the appropriate spell slot and be able to target the ally as normal for the spell." imp11="As an @HLimmediate_action when you know your ward is targeted, you can transpose yourself with your ward, teleporting into the original target's square (and becoming the new target of the attack or spell) while your ally is teleported into yours; this is a teleportation effect that doesn't provoke attacks of opportunity." useInc="4~oracle~3" useF="3~1~4"}

keleshite_prophet.name: Keleshite Prophet
description: ## Keleshite Prophet
‹SOURCE Inner Sea Intrigue/42›
Keleshite prophets help guide and serve the vast Padishah Empire of Kelesh and its interests across Golarion.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] Any.
::cskill{gain=ka~kd~ke~kg~kl~kna~kno~per~perf noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 6th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s6="Clairaudience/clairvoyance" s10="Prying eyes" s12="True seeing" s16="Prediction of failure" s18=Foresight}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A Keleshite prophet must take the following revelation at 1st level."}
:::ab{next title="Divining Dance (Su)" action=Ability icon=boost-magic}

Once per day, you can perform a sacred meditative dance that gives you great clarity of mind and prepares you for what lies ahead. This dance must last for at least 1 minute, uninterrupted, and you can take no other actions during the dance.

When you dance, attempt a Perform (dance) check; the results of the check determine the benefits you gain for the next 24 hours, as listed below. You can always choose the benefit from a lower result, if you wish (for example, if your Perform [dance] result is 15, you can choose to gain a +1 bonus on your divinations' saving throws instead of choosing to use *augury* once as a spell-like ability).
| Perform (dance) Result | Benefit |
| 0-9 | Increase the saving throw DC of any divination spells you cast by 1. |
| 10-19 | Once in the next 24 hours, as an @HL[immediate action], you can use ‹spell/augury› as a spell-like ability, using your oracle level as your caster level. |

| 20-29 | Once in the next 24 hours, you can use ‹spell/divination› as a spell-like ability, using your oracle level as your caster level. If you are at least 8th level, you can cast it in 1 minute instead of 10 minutes. |

| 30-39 | Once in the next 24 hours, you can use ‹spell/commune› as a spell-like ability, using your oracle level as your caster level. If you are at least 10th level, its casting time is in 1 minute instead of 10 minutes. |
| 40+ | Once in the next 24 hours, you can use ‹spell/contact other plane› as a spell-like ability, using your oracle level as your caster level. |

oceans_echo.name: Ocean's Echo
description: ## Ocean's Echo
‹SOURCE Blood of the Sea/12›

Although many ‹race/merfolk› claim deep connections to both art and the natural world, a rare few merfolk can manipulate the forces of nature and weave them into song. An ocean's echo is a merfolk gifted with the powers of an oracle and a singing voice that evokes the legendary tales of merfolk virtuosos.
::cskill{gain=bluff~intm~kna~perf noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 4th, 8th, 10th, 12th, and 14th levels from the oracle's mystery" s4="Sound burst" s8=Shout s10="Song of discord" s12="Greater shout" s14="Pied piping"}

::ab[Inspiring Song (Ex)]{flavor="The voice of an ocean's echo provides inspiration to allies." icon=power-boost ability="This ability is identical to ‹ability/bardic performance› (using Perform &#91&sing&#93& only), as a bard of the ocean's echo's level." imp1="She can ‹performance/inspire courage›." imp3="She can ‹performance/inspire competence›." imp15="She learns to ‹performance/inspire heroics›." usage="A number of rounds/day equal to her level + her Charisma modifier (minimum 1)." replace="Revelations gained at 1st, 3rd, and 15th level"}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/life›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/time›, ‹mystery/waves›, ‹mystery/wind›.

pei_zin_practitioner.name: Pei Zin Practitioner
description: ## Pei Zin Practitioner
‹SOURCE Healer's Handbook/20›

In distant Tian Xia, herbalists practice an obscure alchemical art known as ‹rule/Pei Zin herbalism›, which involves medicinal and restorative techniques that are used throughout much of that continent. A few practitioners develop a talent for Pei Zin that transcends ordinary alchemy, allowing them to blur the line between applying alchemical medicine and coaxing divine miracles.

Like other masters of the art, Pei Zin practitioners can use the ‹skill/Profession« (herbalist)› skill in place of Craft (alchemy) to create alchemical remedies with recipes that include certain plant-derived reagents.

::ab[Master Herbalist (Su)]{icon=boost-magic passive="A Pei Zin practitioner has mastered countless alchemical techniques that supplement her divine powers and greatly aid her when she heals the sick and wounded. She gains a competence bonus on Profession (herbalist) checks equal to 1/2 her oracle level (minimum 1), and uses her Charisma modifier in place of her Wisdom modifier when attempting Profession (herbalist) checks." special="Additionally, a Pei Zin practitioner can identify potions as if via ‹spell/detect magic› using Profession (herbalist) instead of Spellcraft, and she can attempt such a check after holding a potion for 1 round." replace="Class skills gained from the oracle's mystery"}

::ab[Healer's Way (Su)]{icon=aid useMod=Charisma1 flavor="A Pei Zin practitioner combines alchemy, acupuncture, and divine magic to heal wounds by touch." standard="With one use of this ability, she uses positive energy to heal the target of 1d6 hit points for every 2 oracle levels she has. Using this ability is a standard action unless the oracle targets herself, in which case it is a @HLswift_action. Using this ability requires only one free hand." special="This ability counts as a paladin's ‹ability/lay on hands› ability for the purposes of feats, spells, and effects that work with that class feature when it is used for healing purposes. Unlike *lay on hands,* this ability cannot be used to harm undead." replace="Revelation gained at 1st level"}

::ab[Master Healing Technique (Su)]{head l=7 icon=aid free="Whenever a Pei Zin practitioner heals a living creature with her *healer's way* ability, she can attempt a Profession (herbalist) check to remove a condition from the target, with each condition having an accompanying Profession (herbalist) DC (see the list below). She cannot take 10 or 20 on this check, nor can she receive aid from any creature except another Pei Zin practitioner (though the practitioner need not be an oracle)." special="Failure by 5 or more causes the target to become ‹misc/sickened› for 1 round (if the Pei Zin practitioner is attempting to remove the sickened condition, this extends it by 1 round). Similarly, failure by 10 or more instead causes the target to become ‹misc/nauseated› for 1 round or to have its existing nauseated condition extended by 1 round. A creature that cannot be sickened or nauseated cannot have conditions removed by this ability." replace="Revelation gained at 7th level"}
::ab[Minor Conditions (DC 20)]{next icon=aid ability="She can remove the fatigued, shaken, and sickened conditions."}
::ab[Major Conditions (DC 25)]{next icon=aid ability="She can remove the dazed and staggered conditions."}
::ab[Severe Conditions (DC 30)]{next icon=aid ability="She can remove the confused, exhausted, frightened, and nauseated conditions."}
::ab[Dire Conditions (DC 35)]{next icon=aid ability="She can remove the blinded, deafened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions."}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Life›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/succor›.

planar_oracle.name: Planar Oracle
description: ## Planar Oracle
‹SOURCE Ultimate Magic/59›
A planar oracle has an affinity with one of the Outer Planes. She is at home on the multiple planes of the Great Beyond, and can eventually become an outsider herself.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/dark tapestry›, ‹mystery/flame›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/stone›, ‹mystery/waves›, ‹mystery/wind›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="All  bonus spells from the oracle's mystery" s2="Endure elements" s4="Elemental speech" s6=Tongues s8="Planar adaptation" s10="Plane shift" s12="Mass planar adaptation" s14="Shadow walk" s16=Etherealness s18=Gate}

::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info l1="You must choose one Outer Plane with which you have an affinity. This choice cannot be changed." l3="A planar oracle must take the following revelation." replace="3rd-level revelation"}
::ab[Planar Resistance (Su)]{next l=3 icon=def ability="You gain energy resistance 10 against one energy type associated with your chosen plane." imp11="Your energy resistance increases to 20."}

::ab[Final Revelation]{l=20 icon=power ability="You become an extraplanar creature. Choose one outer plane, such as Heaven or the Abyss. You gain superficial physical characteristics as appropriate to natives of your chosen outer plane. For example, if your chosen plane is Heaven, you gain angelic features such as a halo and metallic skin. This change does not alter your Hit Dice, hit points, saving throws, skill points, class skills, or proficiencies. Your type changes to ‹type/outsider› (‹subtype/extraplanar›), except on your associated plane, where your type is outsider (native)." passive="In addition, you gain immunity to your associated energy type and gain damage reduction 10/magic. Unlike other outsiders, you can still be brought back from the dead as if you were a member of your previous creature type." order=ap replace="Final revelation"}

possessed_oracle.name: Possessed Oracle
description: ## Possessed Oracle
‹SOURCE Ultimate Magic/59›
Some oracles are possessed by spirits, demons, or similar beings. Instead of the possessed oracle drawing her powers from deities, these otherworldly forces work their magic through her.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] Any.
::ab[Oracle's Curse]{icon=info note="A possessed oracle must choose the ‹oraclecurse/haunted›, ‹oraclecurse/pranked›, or ‹oraclecurse/tongues› curse at 1st level."}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 1st,@FN1-1 4th, 6th, 8th, 10th, 12th, and 16th levels from the oracle's mystery" s1="Ventriloquism~ @FN1-2" s4="Spider climb" s6=Screech s8=Sleepwalk s10=Telekinesis s12="Animate objects" s16="Divine vessel"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info l1="A possessed oracle must take the following revelation."}

::ab[Two Minds (Su)]{next icon=def-roll passive="You gain a +2 bonus on Will saves against enchantment spells or effects." imp7="You may reroll a failed Will save once per day as an @HLimmediate_action. You must take the second result, even if it is worse."}
:::fakeFootnotes
@FN[No mysteries give spells at 1st level. This is likely supposed to be 2nd level, but no errata was ever published. Consult your GM.]{from=1 multi=2}

psychic_searcher.name: Psychic Searcher
description: ## Psychic Searcher
‹SOURCE Advanced Class Guide/106›

A psychic searcher is devoted to revealing the hidden within the world around her by sensing and communing with residual mental energy, haunts, and fragments of living spirits that can dwell in objects or rooms.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 4th, 6th, 8th, 12th, 16th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s4=Augury s6="Locate object" s8=Divination s12="Find the path" s16="Discern location" s18=Foresight}

::ab[Inspiration (Ex)]{l=2 icon=power ability="A psychic searcher gains an inspiration pool, as the ‹class/investigator› class ability. A psychic searcher uses her oracle level as her investigator level to determine the effects of this ability. She gains free uses of inspiration on Diplomacy, Knowledge (arcana, history, local, nobility, planes, religion), and Sense Motive skill checks without spending a use of inspiration, provided she's trained in that skill. A psychic searcher's inspiration pool refreshes each day, usually when she refreshes her spells. A psychic searcher's inspiration pool is based on her Charisma modifier, not her Intelligence modifier." replace="Mystery spell gained at 2nd level"}

::ab[Psychic Talent (Su)]{l=3 icon=power ability="A psychic searcher's mastery of her supernatural insight grows, granting her a new investigator talent from the following list: ‹invtalent/amazing inspiration›, ‹invtalent/eidetic recollection›, ‹invtalent/empathy›, ‹invtalent/inspired alertness›, ‹invtalent/item lore›, ‹invtalent/perceptive tracking› (except using Sense Motive instead of Perception or Survival), ‹invtalent/rogue talent› (only for ‹talent/hard to fool›), and ‹invtalent/tenacious inspiration›." special="Whenever a psychic searcher can select a new revelation, she can instead select an investigator or rogue talent from the above list." replace="Revelation gained at 3rd level" alter="Revelations gained after 3rd level"}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›.

purifier.name: Purifier
description: ## Purifier
‹SOURCE Advanced Race Guide/86›

The purifier seeks out signs of possession or mind control that manifest from unwilling (and often unwitting) servants for fiendish corruptors and their mortal minions. A purifier seeks liberation of mind, body, and spirit from the bondage of sin and the taint of the unholy. A purifier gains the following class features.
::prereq{r=Aasimar}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/ancestor›, ‹mystery/battle›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/lore›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="All bonus spells from the oracle's mystery" s2="Veil of heaven" s4=Confess s6="Cast out" s8=Denounce s10="Dispel evil" s12=Banishment s14="Holy word" s16="Mind blank" s18=Freedom}

::ab[Diminished Spellcasting]{icon=down note="A purifier can use one fewer spell per day of each level and does not automatically learn cure or inflict spells. Her number of oracle spells known is unchanged."}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A purifier must take the following revelations at the listed levels." replace="Revelations from her mystery gained at 3rd, 7th, and 11th levels"}

::ab[See Sin (Sp)]{next icon=boost l3="A purifier gains a bonus equal to 1/2 her oracle level on Sense Motive checks to sense enchantments, which she can make as a @HLfull-round_action. She also gains a bonus equal to 1/2 her oracle level on Spellcraft checks to identify enchantment school spells and spells with the curse or emotion descriptor."}

::ab[Celestial Armor (Su)]{next icon=def l7="A purifier's armor takes on a golden or silvery sheen and becomes light as a feather. Her armor weighs half as much as long as she wears it, and she also gains *armor training* as a ‹class/fighter› 4 levels lower than her oracle level." l11="A purifier gains ‹feat/heavy armor proficiency›."}

::ab[Sin Eater (Su)]{next icon=magic useMod=Charisma l11="A purifier can consume a curse, enchantment, or emotion effect by touch as a @HLfull-round_action. She must make a Charisma check with a bonus equal to her oracle level against a DC of 11 + the caster level of the effect (or the Hit Dice of the creator for a supernatural effect). If the check succeeds, the effect is negated; however, the purifier is ‹misc/sickened› for 1d4 rounds." special="If the target is possessed (such as by a ‹spell/magic jar› effect or a ‹template/ghost«'s› malevolence ability), the possessor is forced out on a successful check. Whether the check succeeds or fails, the possessor is sickened for 2d4 rounds."}
::ab[Sacred Scourge (Su)]{icon=aura useMod=Charisma1 l5="A purifier may channel holy power to harm evil outsiders as a cleric of her level using the ‹feat/Alignment Channel› feat."}
::ab[Holy Terror (Su)]{icon=boost l9="A purifier may use her *sacred scourge* to panic evil outsiders as if using the ‹feat/Turn Undead› feat against undead."}
::ab[Celestial Master (Su)]{icon=boost l13="A purifier may use her *sacred scourge* to compel good outsiders to serve her, as if using the ‹feat/Command Undead› feat against undead."}

reincarnated_oracle.name: Reincarnated Oracle
description: ## Reincarnated Oracle
‹SOURCE Advanced Race Guide/199›

A reincarnated oracle draws her knowledge and power from the experiences of her previous lives. Her memories guide her through a spiritual ascension leading the way to her ultimate incarnation. A reincarnated oracle has the following class features.
::prereq{r=Samsaran}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/ancestor›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/time›.
::ab[Oracle's Curse]{icon=info l1="A reincarnated oracle must choose the ‹oraclecurse/haunted› or ‹oraclecurse/tongues› curse."}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 4th, 10th, 16th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="See alignment" s4="Detect thoughts" s10="Contact other plane" s16="Moment of prescience" s18="Overwhelming presence"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A reincarnated oracle must take the following revelations at one of the listed levels."}

::ab[Location Memories (Su)]{next icon=power-boost useMod=Charisma3 swift="You may search your past lives for memories of or insight about your current location. This grants you the ‹umr/scent› ability, low-light vision, and a +2 insight bonus on Perception and Survival checks for 1 minute." special="You must take this revelation at 1st level or 3rd level."}

::ab[Spirit Memories (Su)]{next icon=zap-lower ability="Once per day, you call upon the unfulfilled desires and goals of your past lives and project their frustration and despair through your eyes at a target. This is a ‹umr/gaze› attack affecting one creature. The target must make a Will save (DC 10 + 1/2 your oracle level + your Charisma modifier) or be ‹misc/sickened› and ‹misc/staggered› for 1 round. This is a mind-affecting compulsion effect." useMod=Charisma3 special="You must take this revelation at 1st, 3rd, or 7th level."}

river_soul.name: River Soul
description: ## River Soul
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/68›

River soul oracles derive their powers from their bonds with rivers, whether these waterways are rapid cascades or lazy channels plied by boats. The powerful bond formed with a river is also the river soul oracle's curse, as he must always carry water from the river with him, and his fate is bound to it. River soul oracles can be gentle and still when calm, but they're raging torrents when angered.
::cskill{gain=ea~kna~sur~swim noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Life›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/stone›, ‹mystery/waves›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 6th, 8th, 10th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="Hydraulic push" s6="Hydraulic torrent" s8="Control water" s10="Cone of cold" s18="World wave"}

::ab[River Bound Curse (Su)]{icon=info-warning order=na note="You bind your power to one particular river, which is the source of your spells and class abilities. You must carry a small vessel containing water from the river you are bound to at all times. If the vessel is destroyed or travels more than 10 feet away from you, you are unable to cast oracle spells or use your supernatural or spell-like class abilities until you recover the vessel or fill a new one with water from the river to which you are bound." ability="Once per month, you can bond with a different river in a ceremony at that river that takes 12 hours to complete. You lose your bond with the previous river in the process." replace="Oracle's curse"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A river soul oracle must take the following revelations at the listed levels." replace="Revelations gained at 1st and 11th levels"}

::ab[River Flow (Su)]{next l=1 icon=boost free="While you are underwater, you can negate the ‹rule/penalties you take»<underwater_combat› for making bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing melee attacks underwater." useMod=Charisma1 useM=1 useNC}

::ab[River Form (Su)]{next l=11 icon=magic flavor="You can become one with a river." standard="Once a day, while immersed in a river, you can completely merge with it. Your body and all your gear meld into the water, as per ‹spell/meld into stone›, except abilities that control or shape water expel you and deal you 5d6 damage rather than abilities that control or shape stone. You travel along with the river at the rate it is currently moving." useMod=Charisma3 useUnit=hour special="Transforming back to your normal form is a @HLswift_action."}

::ab[River Soul Revelation (Su)]{l=20 icon=def-magic flavor="You strengthen your ties to the river with which you bonded." passive="While traveling on or immersed in the river, you gain ‹umr/fast healing› 10 and immunity to bleed, death attacks, exhaustion, fatigue, nausea effects, negative levels, and sickened effects." special="If you are slain and your body or some part of your body (including your ashes, if applicable) is floated down the river in a specially prepared vessel costing 5,000 gp, you return to life as per ‹spell/resurrection› once you reach the mouth of the river, as long as the trip has taken 24 hours or longer." replace="Final revelation"}

seeker.name: Seeker
description: ## Seeker
‹SOURCE Pathfinder Society Field Guide/29›

Oracles and sorcerers gain their magical powers through strange and mysterious ways, be they chosen by fate or blood. While most might be content with their strange powers, some oracles and sorcerers join the Pathfinders specifically to find out more about their mysteries and bloodlines and determine the genesis and history of their eldritch talents. These spellcasters are known among the Spells as seekers, after their obsession with researching ancient texts and obscure ruins for any clues they can find about their heritage and histories. A seeker has the following class features.
::cskill{gain=ddev noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Tinkering (Ex)]{l=1 flavor="Seekers often look to ancient devices, old tomes, and strange magical items in order to learn more about their oracle mysteries." icon=boost-power passive="A seeker adds half his oracle level on Perception checks made to locate traps and on all Disable Device skill checks (minimum +1)." ability="A seeker can use Disable Device to disarm magical traps. If the seeker also possesses levels in ‹class/rogue› or another class that provides the ‹ability/trapfinding› ability, those levels stack with his oracle levels for determining his overall bonus on these skill checks." order=pa}

::ab[Seeker Lore (Ex)]{l=3 flavor="A seeker has already learned much about his mystery, and is more comfortable using the bonus spells gained by that mystery." icon=boost passive="He gains a +4 bonus on all ‹rule/concentration› checks, on caster level checks made to overcome spell resistance, and on all Knowledge (arcana) and Spellcraft checks made on topics associated with his bonus spells." replace="Revelation gained at 3rd level"}

::ab[Seeker Magic (Su)]{l=15 icon=magic-boost ability="A seeker becomes skilled at modifying his mystery spells with metamagic. When a seeker applies a metamagic feat to any bonus spells granted by his mystery, he reduces the metamagic feat's spell level adjustment by 1. Thus, applying a Metamagic feat like ‹feat/Still Spell› to a spell does not change its effective spell level at all, while applying ‹feat/Quicken Spell› only increases the spell's effective spell level by 3 instead of by 4." special="This reduction to the spell level adjustment for Metamagic feats does not stack with similar reductions from other abilities." replace="Revelation gained at 15th level"}

seer.name: Seer
description: ## Seer
‹SOURCE Ultimate Magic/59›
While all oracles possess some ability at divination, the seer is a true prophet, able to see things as they really are, or will be.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/time›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="Bonus spells granted by the oracle's mystery after 2nd level" s4="Detect thoughts" s6="Clairaudience/clairvoyance" s8=Scrying s10="True seeing" s12="Legend lore" s14="Greater scrying" s16=Vision s18=Foresight}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A seer must take the following revelations at the listed levels."}

::ab[Natural Divination (Ex)]{next l=1 note="This is the same as the ‹mystery/nature› mystery revelation of the same name." icon=def-boost ability="You can read the entrails of a freshly killed animal or humanoid to gain an insight bonus equal to your Charisma modifier on one saving throw." ability2="Alternatively, by observing and interpreting the flights of birds, you may apply a +10 competence bonus on any one skill check." ability3="Finally, by charting marks in dirt or stone, or observing the behavior of sand when thrown into the wind, you gain a +4 insight bonus on one initiative check." special="These bonuses must be used during the next 24 hours and you must declare you are using the bonus before the check or save is made." usage="Making a natural divination takes 10 minutes. You may use natural divination (in any combination) once per day plus a number of additional times per day equal to ‹misc/one-fourth› of your oracle level." order=na23u}

::ab[Gift of Prophecy (Su)]{next l=3 icon=magic ability="Once per day, you can enter a trance to gain a glimpse of the future. This trance lasts for 1 minute, which must be uninterrupted and during which you can take no other actions. You gain the benefits of an ‹spell/augury› spell with 90% effectiveness." imp5="You gain the benefits of a ‹spell/divination› spell with 90% effectiveness." imp9="The knowledge you gain is equivalent to a ‹spell/commune› spell." special="None of these spell effects require material components."}

shigenjo.name: Shigenjo
description: ## Shigenjo
‹SOURCE Advanced Race Guide/164›

The shigenjo walks the path of enlightenment and transcendence by seeking oneness with the celestial spirits. In doing so, she unlocks the martial potential of her own spiritual power. A shigenjo has the following class features.
::prereq{r=Tengu}
::cskill{gain=sur lose=diplo}
::prereq{other="Alignment must have a neutral component"}

@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/ancestor›, ‹mystery/battle›, ‹mystery/flame›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/metal›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/stone›, ‹mystery/time›, ‹mystery/waves›, ‹mystery/wood›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 4th, 8th, 12th, 14th, and 16th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="True strike" s4="Alter self" s8="Divine power" s12="Magic jar" s14="Ki shout" s16="Moment of prescience"}

::ab[Ki Pool (Su)]{l=7 icon=magic ability="A shigenjo gains a pool of ki points, supernatural energy she can use to accomplish amazing feats. The number of points in the shigenjo's *ki pool* is equal to ‹misc/one-third› of her oracle level + her Charisma modifier. The *ki pool* is replenished each morning after 8 hours of rest or meditation; these hours do not need to be consecutive." order=an note="If the shigenjo possesses levels in another class that grants points to a *ki pool,* ki points gained from the shigenjo class stack with those gained from the other class to determine the total number of ki points in the combined *pool,* but only one ability score modifier is added to the total. The choice of which score to use is made when the second class ability is gained, and once made, the choice is permanent." special="The shigenjo can use ki points from this *pool* to power the abilities of every class she possesses that grants a *ki pool.*" replace="7th-level revelation"}}

::ab[Ki Abilities]{ability="As long as she has at least 1 point in her *ki pool,* a shigenjo can make a *ki strike* as an ‹class/unchained monk› whose level is equal to her oracle level - 3." swift="She may spend 1 point of ki to gain one of the following benefits." order=aw icon=melee-power}
::ab[Ki Magic]{next icon=boost passive="Add +1 to the DC of the next spell she casts on her turn."}
::ab[Ki Curse]{next icon=boost passive="Treat her oracle level as 5 higher for the purpose of determining the effects of her *curse* for the next round."}
::ab[Ki Insight]{next icon=boost passive="Gain a +4 insight bonus on Spellcraft checks for 1 round."}

::ab[Quivering Palm (Su)]{l=15 icon=power ability="A shigenjo may learn quivering palm as the ‹class/monk› ability of the same name in place of a revelation. She treats her oracle level as her monk level for this ability, and the DC is based on her Charisma bonus instead of her Wisdom bonus."}

::ab[Final Revelation]{l=20 flavor="You achieve true enlightenment and becomes one with the celestial spirits." icon=power-def-magic ability="You gain the ability to speak with any creature that uses a language. For a number of days equal to your Wisdom score, you can ignore the negative effects of extreme weather, starvation, thirst, and exhaustion. If you die, your powerful connection to the celestial realm allows you to be reborn 3 days later (as ‹spell/reincarnate›)." replace="Final revelation"}

spirit_guide.name: Spirit Guide
description: ## Spirit Guide
‹SOURCE Advanced Class Guide/106›
Through her exploration of the universe's mysteries, a spirit guide opens connections to the spirit world and forms bonds with the entities that inhabit it.
::cskill{gain=ka~kd~ke~kg~kl~kna~kno noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Bonded Spirit (Su)]{l=3 icon=magic order=a2 ability="A spirit guide can form a temporary bond with a spirit, as the ‹class/shaman«'s› *wandering spirit* class feature. She must make this selection each day when she refreshes her spells. A spirit guide cannot bond with a spirit that is incompatible with her alignment, ethos, or mystery (GM's discretion)." ability2="A spirit guide gains one hex of her choice from the list of hexes available from that spirit. She uses her oracle level as her shaman level, and she switches Wisdom for Charisma and vice versa for the purpose of determining the hex's effects." imp4="She adds the bonded spirit's *spirit magic* spells to her oracle spells known for that day, but only of spell levels she can cast." imp7="She gains the *spirit ability* of her current bonded spirit." imp15="She gains the *greater spirit ability* of her current bonded spirit." replace="Revelations gained at 3rd, 7th, and 15th levels"}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/lore›.

stargazer.name: Stargazer
description: ## Stargazer
‹SOURCE Ultimate Magic/59›
Some oracles seek meaning in the pattern of the stars across the night sky, the trails of comets, and the eternal orbits of the planets.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/dark tapestry›, ‹mystery/heavens›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/time›.
::cskill{gain=kna~perf~sur noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="Faerie fire" s4=Glitterdust s6="Guiding star" s8="Wandering star motes" s18="Meteor swarm"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A stargazer must take the following revelations at the listed levels."}

::ab[Guiding Star (Su)]{next order=nap2 icon=power-boost l=1 note="This is the same as the ‹mystery/heavens› mystery revelation of the same name." ability="Whenever you can see the open sky at night, you can determine your precise location." passive="When the night sky is visible to you, you may also add your Charisma modifier to your Wisdom modifier on all Wisdom-based checks." ability2="Once per night while outdoors, you can cast one spell as if it were modified by the ‹feat/Empower Spell›, ‹feat/Extend Spell›, ‹feat/Silent Spell›, or ‹feat/Still Spell› feat without increasing the spell's casting time or level."}

::ab[Star Chart (Ex)]{next order=na l=7 icon=magic note="This is the same as the *heavens* mystery revelation of the same name." ability="Your copious notes contain a working model of the night sky expressed in artistic scribbles and arcane mathematical formulae. Once per day, you may spend 10 minutes contemplating your star chart to gain the benefit of the spell ‹spell/commune›."}

tree_soul.name: Tree Soul
description: ## Tree Soul
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/69›

Tree souls develop an affinity not just with trees but also with objects carved from them, feeling the essence of the tree's spirit living within. By bonding to trees, they learn to manipulate the trees' power to produce divine energy. The type of tree a tree soul oracle bonds to often seems to influence the oracle's personality. A tree soul who is bound to a towering redwood may value traditions and be slow to anger, while a tree soul bound to a smaller pine tree might be quick to react and have a somewhat prickly personality. Regardless of the trees they form their metaphysical attachment to, tree soul oracles tend to be steadfast and stubborn, having an aura of timelessness even as the world changes around them.
::cskill{gain=acro~climb~kna~sur noAlter preTitle=Replaces pre="Bonus skills from the oracle's mystery" preHL}

::ab[Weapon and Armor Proficiency]{icon=down-warning ability="Tree souls are proficient with light and medium armor but are prohibited from wearing metal armor. A tree soul can also wear wooden armor that has been altered by the ‹spell/ironwood› spell so that it functions as though it were steel. Tree souls are proficient with shields (except tower shields) but can use only those crafted from wood." order=an note="A tree soul who wears prohibited armor or uses a prohibited shield is unable to cast oracle spells or use any of her supernatural or spell-like class abilities while doing so and for 24 hours thereafter."}
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Ancestor›, ‹mystery/lore›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/wood›.

::ab[Bonus Spells]{icon=learn note="The oracle gains these bonus spells at the listed levels." replace="The bonus spells gained at 2nd, 10th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 18th levels from the oracle's mystery" s2="Warp wood" s10="Tree stride" s12=Ironwood s14=Changestaff s16="Repel metal or stone" s18="Greater siege of trees"}

::ab[Tree Bound Curse (Su)]{icon=down ability="You bind your power to a specific tree. Any damage to the tree deals the same amount of damage to you, overcoming DR, energy resistance, and immunities. Damage you take in this way cannot be healed by normal or magical means until your bonded tree is healed or destroyed. The damage can reduce you to 0 hit points but not below. If the tree is destroyed, you are considered to be ‹misc/staggered› and are unable to cast oracle spells or use supernatural or spell-like class abilities until you bond with a new tree in a ceremony that takes 12 hours to complete." special="Once per month, you can create a new bond with a different tree in a ceremony at that tree that takes 12 hours to complete. You lose your bond with your previous tree in the process." replace="Oracle's curse"}
::ab[Revelations]{head icon=info note="A tree soul oracle must take the following revelations at the listed levels."}

::ab[Transform Wood (Su)]{next l=1 icon=magic standard="You can temporarily transform a number of 5-foot cubes of wood each day equal to 1 + your Charisma modifier. The wood takes on the quality of ‹eq-material/darkwood› for 1 minute per oracle level." imp11="You can have it instead take on the quality of ‹eq-material/living steel› for the same duration."}

::ab[Living Steel Dolls (Ex)]{next l=11 icon=learn-boost ability="You add ‹spell/animate objects› to your list of spells known. When you cast this spell on wooden objects, the objects' wooden parts immediately transform into living steel. If the objects are destroyed or the duration ends, the wooden parts revert back to their original material."}

::ab[Tree Soul Revelation (Su)]{next l=20 icon=def-magic order=ps passive="Your skin takes on the appearance and properties of a tree trunk. This bark-like skin grants you a +4 natural armor bonus to your Armor Class and DR 10/slashing. You also regrow any severed limbs except your head within 24 hours as per ‹spell/regenerate›." standard="Once a day, you can assume the form of a ‹monster/treant›, as per ‹spell/plant shape III›, for a number of minutes equal to 3 + your Charisma modifier (minimum 1)." replace="Final revelation"}

warsighted.name: Warsighted
description: ## Warsighted
‹SOURCE Advanced Class Guide/106›

A warsighted's unique gifts are not in strange magical revelations, but in her ability to adapt in the midst of a battle with new fighting techniques. The warsighted is a master of combat, as dedicated as a fighter and as flexible as a brawler.

:::ab{l=1 icon=power title="Martial Flexibility (Ex)" action=Ability replace="Revelations gained at 1st, 7th, 11th, and 15th levels" imp7="A warsighted can use this ability to gain the benefit of two combat feats at the same time. She can select one feat as a @HLswift_action or two feats as a @HLmove_action." imp11="A warsighted can use this ability to gain the benefits of three combat feats at the same time. She can select one feat as a @HLfree_action, two feats as a @HLswift_action, or three feats as a @HLmove_action." imp15="A warsighted can use this ability to gain the benefit of one combat feat as an @HLimmediate_action or three combat feats as a @HLswift_action."}

A warsighted can use a @HL[move action] to gain the benefit of a ‹main/combat feat› she doesn't possess. This effect lasts for 1 minute. The warsighted must otherwise meet all the feat's prerequisites. She can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + ‹misc/half› her oracle level.
The warsighted can use this ability again before the duration expires in order to replace the previous combat feat with another choice.

If a combat feat has a daily use limitation (for example, ‹feat/Stunning Fist›), any uses of that combat feat while using this ability count toward that feat's daily limit. At later levels, when she gains multiple feats through this ability, she can use those feats to meet the prerequisites of other feats she gains with this ability. Doing so means that she cannot replace a feat currently fulfilling another's prerequisite without also replacing those feats that require it. Each individual feat selected counts toward her daily uses of this ability.
@HL[Recommended Mysteries:] ‹mystery/Battle›, ‹mystery/bones›, ‹mystery/nature›, ‹mystery/metal›.
